empty.favorites: No favorites yet. Click ♡ on a channel card to save it.
empty.inactive: No channels inactive for over 6 months. Subscriptions look healthy!

stats.noData: Not enough data to show trend.
stats.noDataSub: Data accumulates automatically after each weekly GitHub Actions run.

channelCard.inactive: No new videos in 6+ months — consider unsubscribing
channelCard.unsubscribeQueued: In unsubscribe queue — will be processed on next workflow run
channelCard.unsubscribeTriggered: Added to unsubscribe queue. Run the unsubscribe workflow in GitHub Actions to process.
channelCard.unsubscribeFailed: Failed to add to queue. Please check your GitHub token.
channelCard.unsubscribeNoToken: Sign in with a GitHub token (gist scope) to use the unsubscribe queue.

auth.loginTitle: Sign in to sync favorites across devices
auth.step3: Copy the generated token and paste it below
auth.privacy: Token is stored only in your browser's localStorage and is never sent to any third party.
auth.invalidToken: Invalid token. Please make sure you have the gist scope.

tags.label: Tags
tags.noTagsYet: No tags yet. Add one below.

landing.heroDesc: Manage all 900+ subscribed channels in one place. Explore stats, filter by tags or country, track weekly updates, flag inactive channels, and sync favorites across devices — all powered by a weekly GitHub Actions data pipeline.
landing.featuresSub: A complete toolkit built for subscription management
landing.techSub: Modern frontend technologies — fast, lightweight, and maintainable
landing.footerSub: Built with React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS

stats.title: Statistics Dashboard
stats.desc: Visualize subscription growth over time with line charts, see country distribution in a doughnut chart, and analyze subscriber scale and update frequency at a glance.

search.title: Instant Search
search.desc: Filter channels in real time by typing keywords to quickly find what you're looking for.

filter.title: Smart Filtering
filter.desc: Combine country, tag, and last-video-date filters freely. Sort by name, subscribers, video count, or latest upload.

favorites.title: Favorites Sync
favorites.desc: Star favorite channels and sync them across devices via GitHub Gist — no account or server required.

weekly.title: Recent Updates Feed
weekly.desc: A dedicated feed highlights channels that posted new videos in the last 7 days, grouped by Today, Yesterday, and This Week.

sync.title: Auto Data Sync
sync.desc: GitHub Actions fetches the latest subscription data and commits it every week — fully automated, no manual updates needed.

tags.title: Custom Tags
tags.desc: Channels are auto-tagged by category. Add your own labels to organize subscriptions exactly the way you want, synced via GitHub Gist.

inactive.title: Inactive Detection
inactive.desc: Automatically surfaces channels with no new videos in over 6 months so you can decide whether to keep or drop them.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe Queue
unsubscribe.desc: Queue channels for removal from within the dashboard. A GitHub Actions workflow processes the unsubscription via the YouTube API on your behalf.
